name: Letta dreaming agent
description: Give your coding agents a memory that compounds: Letta reflects over your OpenHands sessions in the background, learning your codebase, conventions, and preferences over time.
exampleImplementation:
Trigger: cron, weekly by default (configurable)
Required secrets: GITHUB_TOKEN (repo write) and the model provider API key

1. On each cron run, sweep local Agent Canvas conversations newer than the stored cursor.
2. Feed them to a persistent Letta dreamer agent; letta dream reflects them into AGENTS.md in a temporary shallow checkout of the target repo.
3. If the doc changed, commit as the token owner with a Letta Code co-author trailer and push the dream branch.
4. Open or update the pull request with a summary of the doc changes.
5. Advance the cursor only on full end-to-end success, so failed runs are retried.
